title: Order counts across all country/status subtotals (CUBE)
prompt: Using GROUP BY CUBE(country, status), count orders for every combination of customer country and order status, including per-country subtotals, per-status subtotals, and the grand total (NULLs mark the aggregated dimension). Columns: country, status, orders. Order by country then status, with NULLs last.

generic: SELECT c.country, o.status, COUNT(*) AS orders
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
ORDER BY c.country NULLS LAST, o.status NULLS LAST

hints: CUBE(a, b) produces every grouping: (a,b), (a), (b), and ().
The aggregated dimension comes back as NULL — order those NULLS LAST.
